jobs.name: Nightly GitHub Sync
jobs.prompt:
Run the nightly Hermes data sync to GitHub by executing this shell script: bash ~/.hermes/bin/nightly-github-sync.sh

The script will:
1. Sync all skills from ~/.hermes/skills/
2. Sync cron job definitions (JSON files only, not output)
3. Sync memories from ~/.hermes/memories/
4. Sync config.yaml with secrets stripped
5. Sync SOUL.md
6. Commit and push to git@github.com:dakshgodara2001/hermes-agent-data.git

After the script runs, report back with:
- How many files changed
- Whether the push succeeded
- Any errors encountered

Keep the response brief.

jobs.name: Morning NSE/BSE Stock Scanner
jobs.prompt:
Run the NSE/BSE stock scanner silently (just builds the cache, no report):

cd /Users/dakshgodara/.hermes/bin && python3 nse_stock_scanner.py --silent 2>/dev/null

This caches the top picks to ~/.hermes/cache/stock_scan_cache.json for the 9:05 AM pre-market pulse to use. Do not deliver anything — just confirm the cache was saved.

jobs.name: Pre-Market Pulse (9:05 AM)
jobs.prompt:
Run the pre-market pulse report by executing:

cd /Users/dakshgodara/.hermes/bin && python3 premarket_pulse.py 2>/dev/null

Take the EXACT output from the script and send it as your response. Do not add any commentary, do not truncate, do not reformat — relay the full output as-is. If the script fails or the cache is missing, report the error briefly.
